helpful: Provisioned complete petition, questions presented, and brief in opposition
CVSG and relist cuts in the committed statpack
CourtListener searches confirming the asserted circuit conflict
gaps: A reachable ranged corpus backend for case-level historical priors
notes: The default uv cache directory was read-only, but redirecting it to /tmp fixed CLI startup. The corpus query then failed on DNS resolution of the ranged remote; CourtListener MCP remained available and the committed statpack supplied calibration.
